h2: Elevate your outdoor fireplace with these durable, realistic gas log sets. Built to withstand the elements, these collections delivery cozy warmth and a natural fireside look for any patio or backyard fireplace.

paragraphs: Elevate your outdoor fireplace with these durable, realistic gas log sets. Built to withstand the elements, these collections delivery cozy warmth and a natural fireside look for any patio or backyard fireplace.

Enrich your open-hearth evenings with the outdoor Woodland Birch vented gas log set. Hand-painted birch logs offer the feel of a traditional fire by replacing real wood, giving you more efficient heat. The tubed burner system displays large flames and glowing embers. Log sets available in 18, 24 and 30-inch widths.

This outdoor gas log set looks so real, friends will ask to grab more kindling for the fire. Replace hassle for rust-resistant, hand-painted smoldering oak logs and a tubed burner system that displays large flames and glowing embers. Log sets available in 18, 24 and 30-inch widths.

The Heritage Oak log set was designed with the outdoor elements in mind. Lose the hassle of a wood fire and enjoy low-maintenance, outdoor evenings with easy electronic ignition and control of rust-resistant, hand-painted logs. Log sets available in 18, 24 and 30-inch widths and two or three-tiered burners.

Enliven your patio evenings with this outdoor vented gas log set. Replace hassle for rust-resistant, hand-painted smoldering oak logs and a tubed burner system that displays large flames and glowing embers. Enjoy the feel of an open-hearth fire. Log sets available in 18, 24 and 30-inch widths.

The Timberland Oak log set was designed with the outdoor elements in mind. Lose the hassle of a wood fire and enjoy low-maintenance, outdoor evenings with easy electronic ignition and control of rust-resistant, hand-painted logs. Log sets available in 18, 24 and 30-inch widths.

Enrich your al fresco evenings with the outdoor Grand Oak vented gas log set. A dozen hand-painted oak logs offer the feel of a traditional fire by replacing real wood, giving you more efficient heat. The tiered burner system displays large flames and glowing embers on multiple levels that you can control via electronic ignition. Log sets available in 18, 24 and 30-inch widths and two or three-tiered burners.

Enliven your patio evenings with the outdoor Grand Birch vented gas log set. Replace hassle for rust-resistant, hand-painted oak logs and a tiered burner system that displays large flames and glowing embers on multiple levels. Enjoy the feel of a wood fire, with easy on/off capabilities thanks to electronic ignition. Log sets available in 18, 24 and 30-inch widths and two or three-tiered burners.
Whether you're updating your current fireplace or adding one to your home, our authorized dealers can show you a range of options that fit your style and budget.

Please refer to the owner’s/installation manual for complete requirements, specifications, testing and listing information. The heat output as well as the appearance of your unit in your specific application—including the flame, embers and overall product appearance—may vary for a variety of reasons from the data and images presented. Product specifications and pricing are subject to change without notice, and installation must adhere strictly to instructions shipped with product. Hearth & Home Technologies reserves the right to update units periodically. If you need help in determining the product that best suits your needs, please see your local authorized dealer.
